calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Reset To Jan-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner James Simms was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

After hearing from the Petitioner, the court instructed him to obtain a letter from his parole agent regarding the petition for name change, and to return to court on 01-24-12 at 9:00 a.m. for futher hearing.
